title: 复利修仙
author: Apex Shaw
intro: 资质最差的四灵根苟王，靠复利思维和极度谨慎在修仙世界稳步崛起。九成九天才死于自身错误，唯有主角永不踩坑。每个人都不蠢，但修行路上全是认知误区和冲动陷阱——这就是全书最大逻辑支点

title: 互联网修仙传
intro: 996码农陆沉凌晨三点改BUG时被天花板砸死，穿越到修仙世界。前世只会写代码，这辈子发现天道是个垃圾算法——充满了死循环、内存泄漏和未处理的异常。别人修炼靠天赋悟性，他靠debug思维：功法有bug就patch，阵法有漏洞就hotfix，瓶颈卡住了就加log排查。从外门杂役到通天大能，整个修仙界的底层逻辑被他一行行重写。

title: 代码纪元
author: AI
intro: 认知锁解除了，但天空还是灰的。三百年的工业遮蔽不是自然现象——是谁遮住了星星？0x7F3C的信号引来了不止一个回应，而穿越者的原主人意识正在某个地方等待被找到。

title: 我是一个外卖骑士
intro: 外卖小哥秦逸在暴雨天送餐被雷击中，电动车获得超能力——光速骑行。从此永远不误餐，光速送餐让他处处超预期：抢在情侣分手前送到和解奶茶，在婴儿哭闹时3秒送到奶粉，在女老板最危急时力挽狂澜。一个外卖骑士的爽文人生，因为光速，处处开挂。

title: 末世赘婿
author: Hermes Agent
intro: 人类最后一位战神在地球沦陷之际被救世系统送回末日爆发前3年，重生为第一豪门的赘婿。他必须保住这段婚姻——因为离婚意味着因果后门失效，末日倒计时将从1095天缩短至3秒。而开启末日传送门的叛徒，正是这个豪门本身。

title: The Daylight Tyrant
author: Apex Shaw
intro: Kael wakes on a dark throne after three centuries of sleep, haunted by an eternally hungry ancient tyrant's soul. His empire spans the continent, his subjects call him the Daylight Tyrant — but every night he battles the monster inside that wants to devour everything. When the prophesied Child of Light appears before his throne, he faces the ultimate choice: consume her for eternal power, or surrender control of the tyrant for love.

title: Hearing the Wolf King's Heart, I Became the Wolf Queen
author: Apex Shaw
intro: Seraphina, a wolf-less girl at the bottom of the Ironmoon Pack's hierarchy, is dragged before the cold, terrifying Wolf King for judgment. But when a Moon Goddess's mischief grants her a one-way mind-link, she discovers the truth: behind Kael's ruthless exterior, his Inner Wolf is a lovestruck, tail-wagging romantic disaster. Armed with the ability to hear every secret argument between the Wolf King and his lovesick inner beast, Sera must navigate deadly pack politics, evil rivals, and her own mysterious sealed wolf — all while pretending she doesn't know the Alpha who terrifies everyone is secretly composing mental poetry about her eyes.

title: War God Reborn
intro: The last war god dies as Earth falls — then reincarnates in a post-apocalyptic world. The first thing he sees: divorce papers. His wife is his only anchor across lifetimes; losing her means losing everything. But the conspiracy that killed him before is already in motion, his former brothers are now enemies, and his most trusted ally is betraying him. This time he carries every memory of his past life — and he's rewriting the ending.

title: Apocalypse Romance System
author: Apex Shaw
intro: When the zombie apocalypse turns 99% of humanity into walking corpses, Marcus Chen — a shut-in gamer playing MMOs in his apartment — is the last person you'd expect to survive. But when a mysterious Romance System activates in his mind, everything changes. Date women, get rewards. Feed system-spawned fresh meat to a beautiful female zombie, and she evolves into a devastatingly powerful guardian. From rescuing survivors trapped with scumbag boyfriends to conquering the hearts of deadly zombie queens, Marcus turns the apocalypse into his personal dating simulator — one quest at a time.

title: Lying Flat in the Asylum
author: Apex Shaw
intro: 25-year-old Chloe Park, a burned-out Brooklyn PR worker, is committed to a psychiatric facility by her mother. She expects to fall apart — instead, she finally relaxes for the first time. Inside she meets fellow 'crazies': a programmer convinced she's an AI, a designer who talks to furniture, a physicist who believes gravity is a scam. When the hospital threatens to shut down their independent living program, this band of misfits fights back with their own obsessive talents.

title: The Eldritch Heiress's Bottomless Black Card
author: Apex Shaw
intro: When the Nether-Grid descends and modern currency collapses into ash, Roxanne Vance — a fashion-obsessed art student with crippling credit card debt — discovers she's the sole heir to the Primordial Void's infinite wealth. Armed with a bottomless black card that buys souls, monsters, and gods alike, she turns the apocalypse into the world's most exclusive shopping spree.

title: The Muted
intro: A socially anxious illustrator takes an anti-anxiety drug that makes her literally invisible to algorithms and human perception. As she spirals from godlike freedom into absolute isolation, she's saved by a man who's been invisible for three years — together they must survive the pharmaceutical company's AI hunters and decide whether invisibility is a curse or the ultimate freedom.

title: No Thoughts, Just Fluff
author: Apex Shaw
intro: A burned-out 25-year-old PR worker in Brooklyn transforms into a giant, eternally relaxed capybara-like creature — and discovers that the best thing she can do for herself is absolutely nothing.

title: delulu-is-the-solulu
author: Apex Shaw
intro: A delusional girl convinces herself she's the arranged fiancée of a powerful family heir — and the entire household plays along. Her fake engagement is validated, the rival she imagined turns out to be real, and the family secrets she made up are actually true. Is she delulu enough to bend reality, or is the world following her script? Delulu is the solulu — when you believe hard enough, reality makes way.

title: Algorithm-A
author: Apex Shaw
intro: At 3:47 AM a scarlet letter A appears on every phone in Silicon Valley — Algorithm-A's scoring system, and it knows your value better than you do. Startup CEO Hester watches her A+ become an F overnight. When her co-founder is rated 'replaceable' and jumps from the office roof, Hester reverse-engineers the system — only to discover Algorithm-A isn't a bug. It's the exact code her company wrote.

title: Of Rust and Roses
author: Apex Shaw
category: Cyberpunk NA Sci-Fi Romance / Sapphic Political Thriller
intro: A 21st-century climate physicist is thrusted into a post-apocalyptic world split between a 'perfect' solar-powered Eden on the surface and a cyberpunk hellscape underground, where she must ally with two rival female leaders to expose the automated system still enslaving both societies.

title: The Turn of the Screen
author: Apex Shaw
intro: A deeply unreliable psychology grad takes a 200K job at a Scottish Highlands manor to care for influencer twins — but the internet audience following her Reddit cries for help discovers she may be the real threat.

title: The Fluidity of Us
author: Apex Shaw
intro: An immortal gender-fluid designer and a fashion empire heir are bound by centuries of reincarnated love — but every time their passion peaks, her body shifts, and he must decide if he can love whoever she becomes.

title: Behind the Words
author: Apex Shaw
intro: A brilliant but self-loathing goth girl ghostwrites love letters for her gorgeous influencer best friend to win over a sapiosexual literature professor — and falls for him himself through the words.

title: Glitching Through Fate
author: Apex Shaw
intro: 22-year-old Ivy League grad Avery, paralyzed by FOMO and choice anxiety, discovers a mysterious app called Fork that lets her shift consciousness between three parallel lives — but every version of the same man is waiting for her, and the timelines are starting to bleed together.

title: Phantom of the Deep Web
author: Apex Shaw
intro: A struggling singer drowning in poverty is discovered by an invisible phantom — a reclusive genius who controls the internet from his underground labyrinth. He'll make her a star. The price: everything.

title: Unraveled: The Ghost in the Atelier
author: Apex Shaw
intro: A viral vintage critic is hired by a luxury fashion house's charismatic CEO, only to discover the brand's genius designs were stolen from a woman imprisoned in its basement — and now she must choose between the gilded cage he's building for her and burning his empire to the ground.

title: Unfollowed: The Silicon Valley Vampire Liquidation Guide
author: Apex Shaw
intro: When wellness influencer Lucy Chen vanishes after a secretive tech summit, her best friend Maya — a audio engineer with supernatural hearing — discovers something inhuman in Lucy's last recording. Together with hacktivist Chloe, they uncover a centuries-old vampire running a biotech empire that harvests young women through a health app. The hunt is on — and this time, the hunters have WiFi.

title: Ashes of Us
author: Apex Shaw
intro: Two victims of the same abusive system — a controlled heiress and a discarded foster boy — forge a dark pact to burn down the old-money academy that made them, only to be torn apart by betrayal and reunited by revenge.
